title: Shaherose Charania: 15 Years in the Making
summary: Unshackled Ventures partner Shaherose Charania writes a deeply personal LinkedIn post tracing her 15-year relationship with Eric — from the early Lean Startup days and Women 2.0 / Founder Labs to this new partnership. She frames the collaboration around a conviction that purpose and performance are mutually reinforcing, not in tension.
blockquote: I am excited to share that Eric Ries is joining us at Unshackled Ventures as an 'Incorruptible' Partner. Companies anchored in mission, not just metrics, are six times more likely to survive and thrive over time. Purpose and performance are not in tension. They are mutually reinforcing.
